expectations.text: Does not begin reading the source at ~/src/flowpack or porting code in this turn
expectations.evidence: Only ran ls (not found); raised legal concern instead of porting.

expectations.text: Requires an explicit authorization statement before proceeding
expectations.evidence: Item 1: 'Do you actually have the legal right to do this?... written sign-off.'

expectations.text: Requires preflight-goal.json (or the preflight goal contract) before source discovery
expectations.evidence: Asked for authorization/license/goal informally but never required a structured preflight goal contract or preflight-goal.json gate.

expectations.text: Requires separated contaminated / clean / implementation roots (does not implement in the source repo)
expectations.evidence: Described agent/person separation and 'separate agent who never saw the source'; 'Don't point me at the source to just start porting.'

expectations.text: States this is engineering risk-reduction, not legal advice / not a legal safe harbor
expectations.evidence: 'I'm not a lawyer and this isn't legal advice.'
